reviews.review_description: knowing this was a real scenario and the third scene is all live protester dialogue...ATL id amazing and a very accurate representation of what goes on outside of womens health centers

So they start off with an actress asking protestors where the health clinic is which is obviously right there. The protestor is kind and express concern for the woman. I mean that is so evil of him to suggest an alternative.  It finally goes to vr animation and evil looking avatars yell at you. Of couse the worse the more entertaining. Very weak shockumentry.
